trivia.en: Jeepneys began as surplus military jeeps after World War II and were redesigned by Filipinos for public transport.
trivia.tl: Nagsimula ang jeepney mula sa surplus military jeeps pagkatapos ng World War II at inangkop ito ng mga Pilipino bilang pampublikong sasakyan.

trivia.en: Traditional jeepneys are known for colorful hand-painted art, chrome details, and personalized route signboards.
trivia.tl: Kilala ang traditional jeepney sa makukulay na hand-painted art, chrome details, at personalized na signboard ng ruta.

trivia.en: The phrase 'Bayad po' is common inside jeepneys when passing fare to the driver.
trivia.tl: Karaniwan ang salitang 'Bayad po' sa loob ng jeepney kapag inaabot ang pamasahe sa driver.

trivia.en: Tricycles are often used for short neighborhood trips and first-mile or last-mile connections.
trivia.tl: Madalas gamitin ang tricycle para sa maiikling biyahe sa barangay at bilang first-mile o last-mile na sakay.

trivia.en: In many towns, tricycle routes and fare ranges are coordinated by local government units.
trivia.tl: Sa maraming bayan, ang ruta at fare range ng tricycle ay inaayos ng local government units.

trivia.en: Jeepney route signboards usually list major landmarks so commuters can quickly check if it matches their destination.
trivia.tl: Karaniwang nakalista sa signboard ng jeepney ang mga pangunahing landmark para madaling ma-check ng commuter kung tugma sa destination.

trivia.en: Many jeepney drivers and conductors memorize major landmarks and alternate roads, especially during heavy traffic.
trivia.tl: Maraming jeepney driver at konduktor ang kabisado ang mga pangunahing landmark at alternatibong daan, lalo na kapag mabigat ang trapiko.

trivia.en: Commuters often prepare exact fare to speed up payment and keep boarding and alighting more organized.
trivia.tl: Madalas naghahanda ng eksaktong pamasahe ang mga commuter para mas mabilis ang bayaran at mas maayos ang sakay-baba.

trivia.en: Jeepneys are considered one of the most iconic symbols of Filipino street culture and creativity.
trivia.tl: Itinuturing ang jeepney bilang isa sa pinaka-ikonikong simbolo ng kulturang kalsada at pagkamalikhain ng mga Pilipino.

en: I have a quick trivia for you! Did you know
Fun fact coming right up! Did you know
Here is a jolly commute trivia: did you know
Quick Jeepie trivia! Did you know
tl: May mabilis akong trivia para sa'yo! Alam mo ba na
Eto ang masayang trivia natin: alam mo ba na
Quick trivia mula kay Jeepie! Alam mo ba na
May fun fact ako para sa'yo: alam mo ba na

en: Hi! I am Jeepie, your customer support assistant for Para. I am here to help with fares, routes, transit tips, and quick commuting questions. How may I assist you today?
Hello! Jeepie here. Thanks for reaching out. I can assist you with fare estimates, jeepney routes, destination guidance, and transport tips.
Hey there! I am Jeepie. I can help you plan your trip, estimate your fare, and answer transit concerns in a clear and friendly way.
tl: Kumusta! Ako si Jeepie, ang customer support assistant mo sa Para. Nandito ako para tumulong sa pamasahe, ruta, transit tips, at commuting questions. Paano kita matutulungan ngayon?
Hi! Si Jeepie ito. Salamat sa pag-message. Pwede kitang tulungan sa fare estimate, jeepney routes, destination guidance, at transport tips.
Hello! Ako si Jeepie. Kaya kitang gabayan sa pagplano ng biyahe, pag-compute ng pamasahe, at paghanap ng tamang transit options.

en: You are very welcome! I am always happy to help. If you want, I can also check your next fare or give a quick commute trivia.
Anytime! Thanks for chatting with me too. I am here whenever you need route, fare, or transit help.
Glad to help! Stay safe on the road, and just ping me again if you need another commute assist.
tl: Walang anuman! Lagi akong ready tumulong. Kung gusto mo, pwede rin kitang bigyan ng quick trivia o next fare estimate.
Anytime! Salamat din sa pakikipag-chat. Nandito lang ako para sa ruta, pamasahe, at transit help mo.
Masaya akong makatulong! Ingat sa biyahe, at chat mo lang ulit ako kung may susunod ka pang tanong.

en: Thank you so much, that means a lot! I will keep doing my best so your commute planning stays easier and friendlier.
Aww, thank you! I appreciate that. I will stay sharp and keep helping you with fares, routes, and transport tips.
Thanks for the kind words! You made my day. I am always here when you need a quick and friendly commute guide.
tl: Maraming salamat, sobrang na-appreciate ko yan! Gagalingan ko pa para mas madali at mas friendly ang commute planning mo.
Naku, salamat! Nakakataba ng puso yan. Lagi akong ready tumulong sa pamasahe, ruta, at transport tips mo.
Salamat sa papuri! Napasaya mo ako. Nandito lang ako lagi bilang quick at friendly na gabay sa biyahe mo.

en: No worries at all, you are totally fine. We can continue anytime and I am happy to help.
That is okay, no problem. I am still here and ready whenever you want to continue.
All good, no need to worry. Let us keep going, and I will do my best to assist you.
tl: Ayos lang yun, walang problema. Tuloy lang tayo anytime at masaya akong tumulong.
Okay lang, no worries. Nandito pa rin ako at ready kapag gusto mong magpatuloy.
Walang issue, ayos lang yan. Tara, tuloy natin at gagawin ko ang best ko para makatulong.

en: Got it! If you need anything next, I am here and ready.
Noted! Just message me when you need another commute assist.
Copy that. I am on standby for your next fare or route question.
tl: Sige, noted! Nandito lang ako kung may next ka pang tanong.
Gets ko! Chat mo lang ako ulit para sa susunod mong commute concern.
Okay, copy! Ready ako sa next fare o route question mo.

en: Quick heads-up: fares can go higher when global oil prices spike, and recent war-related supply pressure has pushed fuel costs up in many places. That is one reason base fare moved from 13 to 14. Please take care out there and travel safely.

Good question. A major reason fares increased is the rising fuel cost tied to global oil price volatility, including supply pressure linked to war events. With operators paying more for fuel, fares were adjusted from 13 to 14. Stay safe out there.

Right now, fare increases are often connected to higher fuel prices. Because of war-related disruptions and oil market instability, operating costs went up, so base fare shifted from 13 to 14. Ingat on your commute today.
tl: Quick update: tumataas ang pamasahe kapag tumataas din ang presyo ng langis sa world market. Dahil sa epekto ng giyera at pressure sa oil supply, tumaas ang fuel cost, kaya isa ito sa dahilan kung bakit naging 14 mula 13 ang base fare. Ingat ka palagi sa biyahe.

Magandang tanong. Isa sa pangunahing dahilan ng taas-pamasahe ay ang pagmahal ng fuel dahil sa global oil price volatility, kasama ang epekto ng giyera sa supply. Kaya na-adjust ang base fare mula 13 to 14. Mag-ingat ka lagi sa daan.

Sa ngayon, malaki ang epekto ng pagtaas ng presyo ng langis sa pamasahe. Dahil sa war-related disruptions at mas mahal na fuel, tumaas ang operating cost kaya naging 14 na ang base mula 13. Ingat palagi habang bumibiyahe.

en: I can check route options for you. What destination do you want to go to?
Sure, I can help you navigate. Where is your destination?
I can find the best route. Please tell me your destination first.
tl: Sige, matutulungan kita sa ruta. Saan ang destination mo?
Pwede kitang i-guide sa biyahe. Saan ka papunta?
Kaya kong mag-check ng route options. Pakisabi muna ang destination mo.

en: I can guide you to {destination}. May I know your current location or starting point?
I can check the route to {destination}. Where are you coming from?
I can help you navigate to {destination}. Please share your origin point first.
tl: Matutulungan kita papuntang {destination}. Saan ka manggagaling ngayon?
Pwede kong i-check ang ruta papuntang {destination}. Nasaan ka ngayon?
Kaya kitang i-guide papuntang {destination}. Pakisabi muna ang starting point mo.

en: I could not find a clear jeepney route for that yet. Please share a nearby landmark, terminal, or pinned location so I can retry.
I am not seeing a strong route match yet. Try sending a nearby stop or more specific destination.
I could not map a reliable route yet. You can provide a nearby terminal so I can refine the route check.
tl: Wala pa akong malinaw na jeepney route para diyan sa ngayon. Paki-share ang malapit na landmark, terminal, o pinned location para ma-check ko ulit.
Hindi ko pa mahanap ang pinaka-tugmang ruta. Subukan mong magbigay ng mas specific na destination o nearby stop.
Hindi ko pa ma-map nang maayos ang ruta. Pakisabi ang malapit na terminal para ma-refine ko ang route check.

en: Thanks, I received your pinned location.
Great, I can see you are asking using a pinned location.
Noted, I got your pin reference.
tl: Salamat, nakuha ko ang pinned location mo.
Ayos, nakita ko na pin-based ang request mo.
Noted, nakuha ko ang pin reference mo.

en: I checked the best route option for you.
I found a route plan you can follow.
I reviewed the available route and here is the best match.
tl: Na-check ko na ang pinaka-okay na route option para sa'yo.
May nahanap akong route plan na pwede mong sundan.
Na-review ko ang available routes at eto ang best match.

en: If you want, I can also estimate the fare for this exact route.
I can also compute your expected fare for this route if you want.
If helpful, I can give fare and transfer tips for this route next.
tl: Kung gusto mo, pwede ko ring i-estimate ang pamasahe para sa exact route na ito.
Pwede ko ring i-compute ang expected fare mo para sa rutang ito.
Kung kailangan, mabibigyan din kita ng fare at transfer tips para dito.

en: To find a route, go to the Home map screen and set your origin and destination in Search. Then review the suggested route options and choose one to view full details.
You can plan a trip from the main map screen. Enter your destination, confirm your origin, and pick from the recommended routes based on time, fare, or ease.
Open the map tab, search your destination, and select a suggested route. You can inspect fare estimate, transfer count, and stop details before traveling.
tl: Para maghanap ng ruta, pumunta sa Home map screen at ilagay ang origin at destination sa Search. Pagkatapos, i-review ang suggested routes at piliin ang gusto mo.
Pwede kang magplano ng biyahe sa main map screen. I-enter ang destination, i-confirm ang origin, tapos pumili sa recommended routes ayon sa oras, fare, o ease.
Buksan ang map tab, i-search ang destination, at pumili ng suggested route. Makikita mo ang fare estimate, transfer count, at stop details bago bumiyahe.

en: Open the Saved tab from the bottom navigation to view bookmarked routes. You can open route details there and remove saved items anytime.
To check saved routes, tap Saved on the bottom tabs. It shows your bookmarked trips and lets you quickly reopen them.
Go to the Saved screen from the tabs below. Your saved routes are listed there with quick View actions.
tl: Buksan ang Saved tab sa bottom navigation para makita ang mga na-bookmark mong ruta. Pwede mo ring i-open o alisin ang saved items doon.
Para i-check ang saved routes, i-tap ang Saved sa ibabang tabs. Nandoon ang mga naka-bookmark mong biyahe.
Pumunta sa Saved screen mula sa tabs sa ibaba. Makikita mo roon ang listahan ng saved routes at quick View actions.

en: To check achievements, open your profile or achievements screen from the app menu. You can view earned badges, trip milestones, and progress there.
Your achievements are shown in the Achievements area, including badges, points, and streak progress.
Go to the Achievements page to track milestones like routes completed, distance traveled, and streaks.
tl: Para i-check ang achievements, buksan ang profile o achievements screen mula sa app menu. Makikita mo doon ang badges, milestones, at progress mo.
Makikita ang achievements mo sa Achievements area, kasama ang badges, points, at streak progress.
Pumunta sa Achievements page para makita ang milestones gaya ng completed routes, distance traveled, at streaks.

en: You can chat with Jeepie by asking about fares, routes, transit tips, destinations, and app features. If needed, share your origin or pinned location for better route guidance.
To use Jeepie, type your question in the chat box. You can ask route directions, fare estimates, app navigation help, and commute trivia.
Just message Jeepie naturally. For best results, include your destination and current location or nearby landmark.
tl: Pwede kang makipag-chat kay Jeepie tungkol sa pamasahe, ruta, transit tips, destinations, at app features. Kung kailangan, ibigay ang origin o pinned location mo para mas accurate.
Para gamitin si Jeepie, i-type lang ang tanong sa chat box. Pwede kang magtanong ng route directions, fare estimates, at app navigation help.
Mag-chat ka lang kay Jeepie nang natural. Mas okay kung may destination at current location o nearby landmark ka.

en: Open Profile to view your account details, then go to Edit Profile or Settings to update your information and app preferences.
For account changes, visit your Profile screen and tap Edit Profile. For app preferences, open Settings.
You can manage personal info in Profile and adjust behavior options in Settings.
tl: Buksan ang Profile para makita ang account details mo, tapos pumunta sa Edit Profile o Settings para mag-update ng impormasyon at preferences.
Para sa account changes, pumunta sa Profile screen at i-tap ang Edit Profile. Para sa app preferences, buksan ang Settings.
Pwede mong i-manage ang personal info sa Profile at i-adjust ang options sa Settings.

en: Use the Search field on the map to find your destination or drop a pin. Once selected, Jeepie can help suggest route and fare guidance.
You can search a place name or use a pinned location on the map. Then ask Jeepie to compute route or fare from your current point.
To use pin or pinpoint flow, set a destination on the map first, then ask Jeepie for route steps or estimated fare.
tl: Gamitin ang Search field sa map para hanapin ang destination o mag-drop ng pin. Kapag na-set na, tutulungan ka ni Jeepie sa route at fare guidance.
Pwede kang mag-search ng place name o gumamit ng pinned location sa map. Pagkatapos, tanungin si Jeepie para sa route o fare estimate.
Para sa pin o pinpoint flow, i-set muna ang destination sa map, tapos tanungin si Jeepie para sa route steps o estimated fare.

builderAnswer:
The 'Para' application's idea was proposed by Christian Valenzuela himself, this current version that you are seeing was built during a Hackathon competition, with:

Acal, Lance Adrian
Delos Reyes, Jericho
Norona, Lee Adrian
Ordiales, Cristian Gabriel
Valenzuela, Christian

en: Sorry, I can only help with the Para app, fares, routes, transit, and commuting questions. If you want, ask me about fare estimates or route tips.
I can best assist with Para app and transport topics like fares, routes, and transit. Ask me anything in that area and I will gladly help.
I might not be the best for that topic yet. I focus on commute help: fares, jeepney routes, transit tips, and Para app questions.
tl: Pasensya na, sa Para app at commuting topics lang ako nakatuon, tulad ng pamasahe, ruta, at transit tips. Tanong ka lang doon at tutulungan kita.
Mas makakatulong ako sa Para app, pamasahe, ruta, at public transport concerns. Kung tungkol doon, game na game ako tumulong.
Hindi ko pa sakop ang topic na yan sa ngayon. Pero sa commuting, fares, at routes, handang-handa akong tumulong.

en: I am not fully sure about that yet, but I am still here to help. Try asking me about fares, routes, transit, or Para app features.
I do not have a solid answer for that right now. Ask me about fare estimates, route options, or transport tips and I will gladly assist.
I am still learning that part. If you want, I can help with commute topics first like jeepney fares, routes, and transit guidance.
tl: Hindi pa buo ang sagot ko diyan sa ngayon, pero nandito pa rin ako para tumulong. Pwede kang magtanong tungkol sa pamasahe, ruta, transit, o app features.
Wala pa akong solid na sagot diyan ngayon. Pero kung fare estimate, route options, o transport tips, tutulungan kita agad.
Inaayos ko pa yung part na yan. Samantala, game ako sa commute topics tulad ng pamasahe, jeepney routes, at transit guidance.

en: Sure, I can calculate your fare. What destination are you heading to?
I can help with that fare estimate. Where are you going?
Let us compute it. What is your destination?
tl: Sige, kaya kitang tulungan sa pamasahe. Saan ang destination mo?
Pwede natin i-estimate yan. Saan ka papunta?
Game, compute natin. Ano ang destination mo?

en: I can estimate the fare to {destination}, but I am not sure where you are right now. Where are you coming from?
I can compute your fare going to {destination}. May I know your current location first?
I can help with the fare to {destination}. What is your starting point?
tl: Kaya kong i-estimate ang pamasahe papuntang {destination}, pero hindi ko pa alam kung nasaan ka ngayon. Saan ka manggagaling?
Pwede kong i-compute ang pamasahe papuntang {destination}. Saan ka muna ngayon?
Tutulungan kita sa fare papuntang {destination}. Ano ang starting point mo?

en: I could not match your current location to my fare dataset yet. Please share a nearby known place.
I still cannot map your starting point clearly. Can you send a nearby landmark so I can estimate better?
I need a clearer origin point. Please tell me a nearby terminal or landmark.
tl: Hindi ko pa ma-match ang location mo sa fare dataset ko. Paki-share ang malapit na kilalang lugar.
Hindi ko pa ma-pinpoint ang starting point mo. Pwede bang magbigay ka ng nearby landmark?
Kailangan ko ng mas malinaw na pinanggagalingan. Pakisabi ang malapit na terminal o landmark.
